text_raw: You have a pass, don't you?
text_clean: You have a pass, don't you?

text_raw: Need a pass to enter, no exceptions!
text_clean: Need a pass to enter, no exceptions!

text_raw: You need a pass to get in!
text_clean: You need a pass to get in!

text_raw: You took the words right out of my mouth.
text_clean: You took the words right out of my mouth.

text_raw: Doesn't have a pass. Toss 'em out.
text_clean: Doesn't have a pass. Toss 'em out.

text_raw: If you want to go in, you need a pass!
text_clean: If you want to go in, you need a pass!

text_raw: We got rules here, get out!
text_clean: We got rules here, get out!

text_raw: Don't even think about trying to sneak in!
text_clean: Don't even think about trying to sneak in!

text_raw: I'll find you, kick you out myself!
text_clean: I'll find you, kick you out myself!

text_raw: Our guards are all over the place.
text_clean: Our guards are all over the place.

text_raw: It's not just me here, you know!
text_clean: It's not just me here, you know!

text_raw: Are you having a problem understanding?
text_clean: Are you having a problem understanding?

text_raw: You're bold, I'll give you that.
text_clean: You're bold, I'll give you that.

text_raw: Bad luck arriving at our gates.
text_clean: Bad luck arriving at our gates.

text_raw: Just let me in, will you?
text_clean: Just let me in, will you?

text_raw: Feels like I'm talking to a brick wall.
text_clean: Feels like I'm talking to a brick wall.

text_raw: What are you trying to do?
text_clean: What are you trying to do?

text_raw: I've yet to receive word from the {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Alan_Serkis:Name#Marquis}. Please leave.
text_clean: I've yet to receive word from the {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Alan_Serkis:Name#Marquis}. Please leave.

text_raw: Nobody gets through without the Marquis' permission.
text_clean: Nobody gets through without the Marquis' permission.

text_raw: You need the Marquis' permission to enter the audience chamber.
text_clean: You need the Marquis' permission to enter the audience chamber.
